title: casearia tomentosa subsp. tomentosa
intro: Casearia tomentosa subsp. tomentosa, also known as the Wild Cotton, is a species of plant in the family Salicaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Casearia tomentosa subsp. tomentosa include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections, as well as its potential to help manage diabetes and high blood pressure. Casearia tomentosa subsp. tomentosa can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and capsules, making it a versatile remedy in folk medicine.
